title: Gate terminal view behind --experimental flag
description: The TUI/terminal view (host shell via WebSocket/PTY) must only be available when k13d is started with --experimental. Without the flag: no route, no UI button.

stories.title: Add --experimental CLI flag
acceptanceCriteria: K13D_EXPERIMENTAL env var is the fallback default
Experimental: *experimental is set on authOpts before calling runWebServer

stories.title: Thread experimental flag into Server struct
acceptanceCriteria: AuthOptions struct has Experimental bool field in pkg/web/auth_core.go
Server struct has experimental bool field in pkg/web/server.go
NewServerWithAuth sets s.experimental = authOpts.Experimental before returning

stories.title: Gate /api/tui/shell route registration
acceptanceCriteria: In pkg/web/routes.go, /api/tui/shell is only registered when s.experimental is true
HandleTUIShell in tui_shell_handler.go returns 403 if !s.experimental (defence in depth)

stories.title: Expose /api/features public endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: /api/features is registered as a public (no-auth) route in registerPublicRoutes
handleFeatures returns JSON {"experimental": true|false} reflecting s.experimental

stories.title: Hide TUI button in frontend unless experimental
acceptanceCriteria: ai-mode-selector div has id='ai-mode-selector' and style='display:none' in index.html
initExperimentalFeatures() fetches /api/features and shows selector only when experimental===true
initExperimentalFeatures is wired to window 'load' event in app.js

stories.title: Build and test pass
acceptanceCriteria: go build ./... succeeds with no errors
